---
title: "Wharf Occupancy Analysis"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(jsonlite)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
```

## 参数设置

```{r}
# 码头长度
WHARF_LENGTH <- 3764

# 数据文件
DATA_FILE <- "event_vessel_depart_40_hm.json"
```

## 辅助函数

```{r}
load_json_data <- function(filename) {
  fromJSON(filename, flatten = TRUE)
}

build_vessel_wharf_map <- function(events) {
  # 建立vesselId到wharf的映射（从OnStart事件中获取）
  on_start <- events %>% filter(eventName == "OnStart")
  setNames(on_start$wharf, on_start$vesselId)
}

get_vessel_intervals <- function(events, wharf_name) {
  # 获取指定码头的船只停泊区间

  # 排序事件
  events_sorted <- events %>% arrange(time)

  # 建立vesselId到wharf的映射
  vessel_wharf_map <- build_vessel_wharf_map(events_sorted)

  # 为缺少wharf字段的事件补全wharf信息
  events_sorted <- events_sorted %>%
    mutate(wharf = ifelse(is.na(wharf) & vesselId %in% names(vessel_wharf_map),
                          vessel_wharf_map[vesselId],
                          wharf))

  # 只保留目标wharf的事件
  events_filtered <- events_sorted %>% filter(wharf == wharf_name)

  # 收集OnStart事件
  starts <- events_filtered %>%
    filter(eventName == "OnStart") %>%
    select(vesselId, start_time = time, wharfmark_start, wharfmark_end)

  # 收集OnReadyToDepart事件
  departs <- events_filtered %>%
    filter(eventName == "OnReadyToDepart") %>%
    select(vesselId, end_time = time)

  # 合并
  intervals <- starts %>%
    left_join(departs, by = "vesselId")

  return(intervals)
}
```

## 读取数据

```{r}
events <- load_json_data(DATA_FILE)

# 确保关键列存在（OnReadyToDepart事件可能缺少wharf等字段，fromJSON会自动填NA）
if (!"wharf" %in% names(events)) {
  events$wharf <- NA_character_
}
if (!"wharfmark_start" %in% names(events)) {
  events$wharfmark_start <- NA_real_
}
if (!"wharfmark_end" %in% names(events)) {
  events$wharfmark_end <- NA_real_
}
```

## wharf_N 占用图

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
intervals_N <- get_vessel_intervals(events, "wharf_N")
cat(sprintf("wharf_N: %d vessels\n", nrow(intervals_N)))

if (nrow(intervals_N) > 0) {
  # 未离开的船，使用最大时间
  all_times <- c(intervals_N$start_time, na.omit(intervals_N$end_time))
  time_max <- max(all_times)

  plot_data_N <- intervals_N %>%
    mutate(end_time = ifelse(is.na(end_time), time_max, end_time))

  ggplot(plot_data_N) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = wharfmark_start, xmax = wharfmark_end,
                  ymin = start_time, ymax = end_time, fill = vesselId),
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(x = (wharfmark_start + wharfmark_end) / 2,
                  y = (start_time + end_time) / 2,
                  label = vesselId),
              size = 2, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, WHARF_LENGTH)) +
    labs(title = "wharf_N Occupancy Chart",
         x = "Position along wharf (wharfmark)",
         y = "Time") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

## wharf_S 占用图

```{r fig.width=12, fig.height=10}
intervals_S <- get_vessel_intervals(events, "wharf_S")
cat(sprintf("wharf_S: %d vessels\n", nrow(intervals_S)))

if (nrow(intervals_S) > 0) {
  all_times <- c(intervals_S$start_time, na.omit(intervals_S$end_time))
  time_max <- max(all_times)

  plot_data_S <- intervals_S %>%
    mutate(end_time = ifelse(is.na(end_time), time_max, end_time))

  ggplot(plot_data_S) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = wharfmark_start, xmax = wharfmark_end,
                  ymin = start_time, ymax = end_time, fill = vesselId),
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(x = (wharfmark_start + wharfmark_end) / 2,
                  y = (start_time + end_time) / 2,
                  label = vesselId),
              size = 2, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, WHARF_LENGTH)) +
    labs(title = "wharf_S Occupancy Chart",
         x = "Position along wharf (wharfmark)",
         y = "Time") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")
}
```

## 导出PNG图片

```{r}
if (nrow(intervals_N) > 0) {
  all_times <- c(intervals_N$start_time, na.omit(intervals_N$end_time))
  time_max <- max(all_times)

  plot_data_N <- intervals_N %>%
    mutate(end_time = ifelse(is.na(end_time), time_max, end_time))

  p_N <- ggplot(plot_data_N) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = wharfmark_start, xmax = wharfmark_end,
                  ymin = start_time, ymax = end_time, fill = vesselId),
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(x = (wharfmark_start + wharfmark_end) / 2,
                  y = (start_time + end_time) / 2,
                  label = vesselId),
              size = 2, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, WHARF_LENGTH)) +
    labs(title = "wharf_N Occupancy Chart",
         x = "Position along wharf (wharfmark)",
         y = "Time") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  ggsave("wharf_N_chart_R.png", plot = p_N, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 150)
  cat("Saved wharf_N_chart_R.png\n")
}

if (nrow(intervals_S) > 0) {
  all_times <- c(intervals_S$start_time, na.omit(intervals_S$end_time))
  time_max <- max(all_times)

  plot_data_S <- intervals_S %>%
    mutate(end_time = ifelse(is.na(end_time), time_max, end_time))

  p_S <- ggplot(plot_data_S) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = wharfmark_start, xmax = wharfmark_end,
                  ymin = start_time, ymax = end_time, fill = vesselId),
              color = "black", linewidth = 0.3, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(x = (wharfmark_start + wharfmark_end) / 2,
                  y = (start_time + end_time) / 2,
                  label = vesselId),
              size = 2, fontface = "bold") +
    scale_y_reverse() +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, WHARF_LENGTH)) +
    labs(title = "wharf_S Occupancy Chart",
         x = "Position along wharf (wharfmark)",
         y = "Time") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "none")

  ggsave("wharf_S_chart_R.png", plot = p_S, width = 12, height = 10, dpi = 150)
  cat("Saved wharf_S_chart_R.png\n")
}

cat("Done!\n")
```
